name: Sole Proprietorship
description: Business income reported on the owner’s individual return (Schedule C).
deadlineInfo: Due April 15, 2026 with extension to October 15, 2026.

name: Partnership
description: Pass-through entity filing Form 1065 and issuing Schedule K-1s.
deadlineInfo: Due March 16, 2026 with extension to September 15, 2026.

name: S Corporation
description: Pass-through corporation filing Form 1120-S and issuing Schedule K-1s.
deadlineInfo: Due March 16, 2026 with extension to September 15, 2026.

name: C Corporation
deadlineInfo: Due April 15, 2026 with extension to October 15, 2026.

name: LLC
description: Deadline depends on tax classification (Schedule C, 1065, or 1120).
deadlineInfo: Single-member LLCs follow April 15; multi-member LLCs follow March 16.

name: Nonprofit
deadlineInfo: Due May 15, 2026 with extension to November 15, 2026.
